steps.title: Find the table intersection
steps.content: The question asks for the estimated impact of invasive mongooses on threatened mammals. The needed value is at the intersection of the mongooses row and the mammals column in the table.

steps.title: Reject wrong cells
steps.content: Choice A gives 0.35, which is not the requested mongooses-and-mammals value. Choice B gives 0.61, the cats-and-mammals value. Choice D gives 0.52, the cats-and-reptiles value. The mongooses-and-mammals cell is 0.75. The answer is C.
